run_summary: Screen 2 has zero open positions and two recent flags. ASAN is OVERDONE (ineligible for long-only book); MOD is UNCLEAR (insufficient conviction to trade). No new entries this run.

entries.name: Asana, Inc.
entries.thesis: Filings show a sub-100% net retention business with repeated guidance resets and significant executive departures right before the print. The market may be under-pricing the risk that retention deteriorates further or that the new leadership team uses the print as a 'kitchen sink' opportunity.
entries.what_kills: AI Studio / AI Teammates monetization showing real ARR contribution, NRR stabilizing or upticking, or large-customer count ($100K+) re-accelerating which would suggest the enterprise motion is finally compounding.
entries.reasoning: OVERDONE — long-only book has no way to express this

entries.name: Modine Manufacturing Company
entries.thesis: Filings present a genuinely two-sided setup: bullish Data Center Cooling secular tailwind vs. bearish PT softness plus deal-execution risk and management distraction. Without earnings P&L visibility, conviction is too low to commit directionally.
entries.reasoning: Classification is UNCLEAR, not UNDERDONE. Thesis is explicitly two-sided (Data Center Cooling tailwind vs. Performance Technologies softness + deal distraction). Confidence is 2, below min_buy_confidence of 3. Earnings cover-page-only 8-Ks provide no P&L visibility to ground directional conviction. Insufficient signal to commit.
